case_title: SANDY WAGNER VS. HEALD COLLEGE et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-14-2011 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE A CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT PRIOR TO THE CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OR DISMISSAL AFTER TERMINATION OF BANKRUPTCY. THE FEB-10-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING MAR-14-2011 AT 1:30PM. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
